query.query_string: Celecoxib AND rheumatoid factor-positive polyarticular juvenile idiopathic arthritis

data.query: Celecoxib AND rheumatoid factor-positive polyarticular juvenile idiopathic arthritis

results.title: Safety of celecoxib and nonselective nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs in juvenile idiopathic arthritis: results of the Phase 4 registry.
results.abstract: This study aimed to assess long-term safety and developmental data on juvenile idiopathic arthritis (JIA) patients treated in routine clinical practice with celecoxib or nonselective nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (nsNSAIDs).
mesh_terms: Drug-Related Side Effects and Adverse Reactions
